Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.registry.driver

Class OciRegistryClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.salesforce.multicloudj.registry.driver.OciRegistryClient
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AutoCloseable
    public class OciRegistryClient
extends Object
implements AutoCloseable
    OCI Registry API v2 HTTP client; handles auth and registry operations.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      OciRegistryClient​(String registryEndpoint, AuthProvider authProvider)
      Creates a new OciRegistryClient.
      OciRegistryClient​(String registryEndpoint, AuthProvider authProvider, org.apache.http.impl.client.CloseableHttpClient httpClient)
      Creates OciRegistryClient with specified HttpClient.

      Downloads a blob (layer or config) by digest.

      Fetches the image manifest for the given repository and reference (tag or digest).

      Builds HTTP Authorization header for the given repository.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • OciRegistryClient

        public OciRegistryClient​(String registryEndpoint,
                         AuthProvider authProvider)
        Creates a new OciRegistryClient.

        The HTTP client is configured with an AuthStrippingInterceptor that removes Authorization headers when following redirects to external hosts. This is required for registries like AWS ECR that redirect blob downloads to S3 pre-signed URLs.

        Parameters:
        registryEndpoint - the registry base URL
        authProvider - the authentication provider

      • OciRegistryClient

        public OciRegistryClient​(String registryEndpoint,
                         AuthProvider authProvider,
                         org.apache.http.impl.client.CloseableHttpClient httpClient)
        Creates OciRegistryClient with specified HttpClient.
        Parameters:
        registryEndpoint - the registry base URL
        authProvider - the authentication provider
        httpClient - the HTTP client to use (null to create default)

    • Method Detail

      • getHttpAuthHeader

        public String getHttpAuthHeader​(String repository)
        Builds HTTP Authorization header for the given repository. Discovers auth requirements on first call and caches the result.
        Parameters:
        repository - the repository name (used for Bearer token scope)
        Returns:
        the Authorization header value, or null if anonymous access (no auth required)
        Throws:
        InvalidArgumentException - if authentication scheme is blank or missing
        UnSupportedOperationException - if authentication scheme is not supported

      • fetchManifest

        public Manifest fetchManifest​(String repository,
                              String reference)
        Fetches the image manifest for the given repository and reference (tag or digest). HTTP GET /v2/{repository}/manifests/{reference}.
        Parameters:
        repository - the repository name (e.g., "my-repo/my-image")
        reference - the tag or digest (e.g., "latest" or "sha256:...")
        Returns:
        the parsed Manifest object
        Throws:
        ResourceNotFoundException - if manifest not found (404)
        UnAuthorizedException - if authentication fails (401)
        UnknownException - if the request fails or manifest cannot be parsed

      • downloadBlob

        public InputStream downloadBlob​(String repository,
                                String digest)
        Downloads a blob (layer or config) by digest. HTTP GET /v2/{repository}/blobs/{digest}.

        The response body is returned as an InputStream for streaming consumption. Caller is responsible for closing the stream.

        Parameters:
        repository - the repository name
        digest - the blob digest (e.g., "sha256:...")
        Returns:
        InputStream of blob content (caller must close)
        Throws:
        ResourceNotFoundException - if blob not found (404)
        UnAuthorizedException - if authentication fails (401/403)
        UnknownException - if the request fails

      • getRegistryEndpoint

        public String getRegistryEndpoint()

      • close

        public void close()
           throws Exception
        Specified by:
        close in interface AutoCloseable
        Throws:
        Exception
